info.name: WعY Journey — Backend API
info.description:
## WعY Journey API Collection

Full REST API for the WعY Journey mental wellness platform.

### Recommended Run Order
1. **Auth → Login as Admin** — sets `adminToken` + `token`
2. **Admin → Coaches → Create Coach** — sets `coachId`
3. **Admin → Tests → Create Test** — sets `testId`
4. **Admin → Questions → Add Question** — sets `questionId`
5. **Auth → Login as User** — updates `token` to user scope
6. **Tests → List All Tests** — refreshes `testId`
7. **Tests → Get Test with Questions** — sets `q1Id`, `q2Id`
8. **Tests → Submit Test** — sets `submissionId`
9. **Chat → Start Conversation** — sets `conversationId`

### Auto-Managed Variables
| Variable | Set By |
|---|---|
| `token` | Login as User / Login as Admin |
| `adminToken` | Login as Admin |
| `testId` | Admin → Create Test OR Tests → List All |
| `questionId` | Admin → Add Question |
| `q1Id`, `q2Id` | Tests → Get Test with Questions |
| `coachId` | Admin → Create Coach OR Coaches → List |
| `conversationId` | Chat → Start Conversation |
| `submissionId` | Tests → Submit Test |
| `userId` | Admin → Create User |
| `submissionAdminId` | Admin → List Submissions |

variable.description: JWT for current user — auto-set by login
JWT for admin — auto-set by Login as Admin
First question _id from Get Test with Questions
Second question _id from Get Test with Questions
User submission _id — set by Submit Test
Admin-created user _id — set by Create User

item.name: 🔑 Auth
item.description: Registration, login, logout, and current user profile.

request.description:
Register a new user account. Role is always `user` — admins are seeded or created via Admin → Create User.

**Validations:** name + email + password required, password ≥ 8 chars, unique email.

**Returns:** `{ message, userId }`

Login as a regular user. Saves JWT to `token` for all authenticated endpoints.

**Returns:** `{ token, user: { id, name, email, role } }`

exec: console.log("✅ adminToken + token saved for:", json.user.email);

request.description:
Login using the seeded admin credentials. Saves token to both `adminToken` and `token`.

**Run this first** before calling any `/admin/*` endpoint.

Credentials are set in `.env`: `SEED_ADMIN_EMAIL` / `SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD`.
Stateless logout — the server returns 200 and the client discards the token. No token blocklist is maintained.
Returns the authenticated user's profile fetched live from the database (not decoded from token).

Generates a 6-digit OTP, stores a bcrypt hash of it (with 10-minute expiry), and emails it to the user.

Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists — this prevents user enumeration attacks.

**Flow:** Forgot Password → Verify OTP → Reset Password

Checks the OTP is valid and not expired **without consuming it**. Use this to confirm the code before showing the new-password form.

**Errors:**
- `400` — invalid code
- `400` — code has expired

After success, call **Reset Password** with the same OTP.

Re-verifies the OTP, hashes the new password, saves it, and **clears the OTP fields** so the code cannot be reused.

**Validations:** all 3 fields required, newPassword ≥ 8 chars, OTP must still be valid.

After success, the user can log in with their new password.

item.name: 🧪 Tests
item.description: Browse tests, view questions, submit answers, and fetch results. Most endpoints require authentication.

exec: console.warn("⚠️ No tests found. Run Admin → Tests → Create Test first.");

request.description: Returns all tests with `title`, `description`, `type`, `isPremium`, `createdAt`. Saves the first `_id` to `testId`.

exec: pm.test("Scoring metadata NOT exposed to client", () => {

request.description:
Returns the test with all its questions. `dimension` and `favoredPole` are **stripped from the response** — scoring is computed server-side only.

Also saves the first 2 question IDs to `q1Id` and `q2Id` for the Submit Test request.

exec: if (!testId) console.warn("⚠️ testId is empty — run 'List All Tests' first.");
if (!q1Id) console.warn("⚠️ q1Id is empty — run 'Get Test with Questions' first.");
console.log("✅ result:", json.result, "| submissionId saved:", json.submissionId);
pm.test("MBTI result is 4 letters (if personality test)", () => {

request.description:
Submit answers for a test.

**Before running:** execute `Get Test with Questions` to set `q1Id` / `q2Id`, or supply real MongoDB ObjectIds.

**selectedValue** options:
| Value | Meaning |
|---|---|
| A | Strongly Agree |
| B | Agree |
| C | Neutral |
| D | Disagree |
| E | Strongly Disagree |

**Returns:** `{ result, description, score, submissionId }`
Returns the authenticated user's latest submission for the specified test.

item.name: 👤 Profile
item.description: View and update the authenticated user's profile and submission history.

request.description: Returns the current user's profile alongside all their test submissions (with test titles populated).
Update the current user's profile. All three fields (`name`, `age`, `avatar`) are optional — send only what needs to change.

formdata.description: Select an image file (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF — max 2 MB)

request.description:
Upload an avatar image as `multipart/form-data`.

**Field name:** `avatar` (file)

**Allowed types:** JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF

**Max size:** 2 MB

The old avatar file is automatically deleted from disk when a new one is uploaded. The returned `avatar` URL is a relative path (`/uploads/avatars/<filename>`) served as a static file by the backend.

**Returns:** `{ message, avatar, user }`

item.name: 🏋️ Coaches
item.description: Public coach directory — no authentication required.

exec: console.warn("⚠️ No coaches. Run Admin → Coaches → Create Coach first.");

request.description: Returns all coaches where `isAvailable: true`. No auth required. Saves first `_id` to `coachId`.
Returns a single coach's public profile.

item.name: 💬 Chat
item.description:
Real-time messaging with coaches. All endpoints require authentication.

Socket.IO event emitted on send: `new_message` to room `conversationId`.

exec: if (!coachId) console.warn("⚠️ coachId is empty — run 'List Available Coaches' first.");

request.description:
Find or create a conversation between the current user and a coach. **Idempotent** — calling twice returns the same conversation.

Saves `_id` to `conversationId`.

Returns conversations scoped to the caller's role:
- **user** → their own conversations
- **coach** → conversations where they are the coach
- **admin** → all conversations
Returns all messages in a conversation sorted by `createdAt` ascending. Access restricted to the conversation's user, their coach, or an admin.
Send a message in a conversation. The server saves the message, updates `lastMessageAt`, and emits a `new_message` Socket.IO event to the conversation room.

item.name: ⚙️ Admin
item.description:
Admin-only endpoints — all require `adminToken`.

Run **Auth → Login as Admin** first.

request.description:
Returns platform-wide dashboard data:
- Total counts: users, tests, submissions, coaches, conversations
- `recentSubmissions`: last 7 submissions with user + test info
- `popularTests`: top 5 tests by submission count
Returns all tests with `createdBy` populated.
Returns a test with full questions (including `dimension` + `favoredPole`) and total submission count.

Create a new test. Saves `_id` to `testId`.

**type** values: `personality` | `psychiatric` | `general`
Update a test's metadata. All body fields are optional.
⚠️ **Destructive** — permanently deletes the test and all of its questions and submissions.
Returns all questions for a test sorted by `order`. Includes admin-only fields `dimension` and `favoredPole`. Saves first `_id` to `questionId`.

Add a question to a test.

**MBTI fields (for personality tests):**
- `dimension`: `EI` | `SN` | `TF` | `JP`
- `favoredPole`: `E` | `I` | `S` | `N` | `T` | `F` | `J` | `P`

Omit `dimension` / `favoredPole` for non-MBTI tests.

Saves `_id` to `questionId`.
Update an existing question. All fields optional.
Permanently delete a single question.

List all users. Optional filters:
- `?role=user|admin|coach`
- `?search=<partial name or email>`
Full user profile plus all their test submissions.
Create a user account directly — bypasses public signup and can assign any role (`user`, `admin`, `coach`). Saves `id` to `userId`.

Change a user's role. Valid: `user` | `admin` | `coach`.

⚠️ Admin cannot change their own role.
⚠️ **Destructive** — deletes user + all their submissions. Admin cannot delete themselves.

List all submissions with user + test info populated. Filters:
- `?testId=<id>` — narrow to a specific test
- `?userId=<id>` — narrow to a specific user

Saves first `_id` to `submissionAdminId`.
Full submission detail with answers populated (question text and dimension).
Permanently delete a submission record.
Returns all coaches including unavailable ones (admin-only view).
Returns a coach profile with the number of active conversations they have.

formdata.value: Dr. Layla has 12 years of experience helping individuals overcome anxiety, depression, and life transitions.

formdata.description: Upload a JPEG/PNG/WEBP/GIF image (max 2 MB). Leave empty to omit photo.

request.description:
Create a coach profile. **Only admins can create coaches** — no self-registration. Saves `_id` to `coachId`.

Send as `multipart/form-data`. Upload a photo file in the `photo` field (JPEG/PNG/WEBP/GIF, max 2 MB). Leave `photo` empty to create the coach without a photo.

formdata.value: Dr. Layla has 12 years of experience. Now specializing in trauma therapy and resilience building.

formdata.description: Upload a new photo to replace the existing one (JPEG/PNG/WEBP/GIF, max 2 MB). Leave empty to keep the current photo.

request.description:
Update a coach profile. All fields are optional.

Send as `multipart/form-data`. Upload a new photo file in the `photo` field to replace the existing one — the old file is deleted automatically. Leave `photo` empty to keep the current photo.
Permanently delete a coach profile.
